scope.source_policy: Only TurboScribe-named archives and TurboScribe-named docs were used for strategy conversion. Non-TurboScribe legacy dumps were excluded from this fresh pass.

bot_safety_floor.mode: OANDA practice only until replay and paper receipts prove edge
required_controls: OCO or equivalent stop/target attached before entry
no strategy enabled from transcript alone without replay validation

primary_sources.member: The Best Top Down Analysis Strategy for 2025  Forex Trading Guide.txt
This Trading Strategy is Boring, but Made Me My First $100,000.txt

strategies.market_fit: Liquid FX pairs; usable as a direction gate for OANDA practice bot.

exact_parameters.name: bias_timeframes
exact_parameters.source_note: Top-down source names these as the main frames.

exact_parameters.name: entry_alignment_ladder
exact_parameters.source_note: Boring strategy source walks weekly down to 15m.

entry_logic: Only permit long signals when weekly/daily/4H structure agrees upward; only permit short signals when they agree downward.
Use 15m to 2H candles for entry timing after higher-timeframe alignment is established.

gates: lower confidence if 4H and daily disagree

primary_sources.member: Moving Average Trading Tutorial (For Day Trading).txt
Step-by-Step Tutorial to Make Consistent Daily Profits in 2026.txt
How to Scalp Like an Elite Prop Trader (Inside Look).txt

strategies.market_fit: Fast liquid sessions; best for London/NY overlap and tight-spread FX majors.

exact_parameters.name: context_ma
exact_parameters.source_note: Moving average source discusses 200-day SMA/EMA as context, not trigger.

exact_parameters.name: risk_reward_floor
exact_parameters.value: 2:1 minimum, 3:1 preferred, 4:1+ stretch only after proof
exact_parameters.source_note: Daily profits and risk training sources explicitly discuss 2:1, 3:1, and 4:1 examples.

entry_logic: Require a strong directional move before the pullback.
Prefer first touch or reclaim of the 9 EMA; de-rank late repeated touches.
Enter only after buyers/sellers respond at the 9 EMA or reclaim zone and momentum resumes.
exit_logic: Stop goes below the pullback/reclaim low for longs or above it for shorts.
Take profit should be framed in R multiples; do not force fantasy targets.
Trail with structure or EMA only after trade has expanded enough to justify protection.

primary_sources.member: Most Effective RANGE Trading Strategy for Crypto Forex & Stocks (SidewaysChoppy Market Strategy).txt
Most Effective RANGE Trading Strategy for Crypto Forex & Stocks (SidewaysChoppy Market Strategy).txt

strategies.market_fit: All liquid markets; for OANDA use it as a regime classifier before trend workflows fire.

exact_parameters.name: range_levels
exact_parameters.source_note: Source instructs drawing support below and resistance above the range.

exact_parameters.name: narrow_range_action
exact_parameters.source_note: Source says narrow range usually precedes breakout.

exact_parameters.name: wide_range_action
exact_parameters.source_note: Use support/resistance zones after identifying a true range.

entry_logic: Classify market as trend, wide range, or narrow range before scanning entry workflows.
Wide range: buy support rejection or sell resistance rejection only when risk/reward is clean.
Narrow range: wait for breakout and follow-through; avoid blind MACD/indicator signals in chop.

gates: disable trend continuation inside unresolved chop

primary_sources.member: How I Avoid False Breakouts (My Secret Technique).txt

strategies.market_fit: All breakout workflows; especially useful on 1m/5m/15m execution charts.

exact_parameters.name: example_consolidation_rule
exact_parameters.value: about half the initial move; source example: 15-bar move wants about 7 minutes consolidation
exact_parameters.source_note: Used as a wait-quality filter, not a universal constant.

exact_parameters.name: multi_timeframe_break_pressure
exact_parameters.source_note: Source references one-minute action around a 15-minute key level.

entry_logic: Do not buy/sell the first break unless expansion and follow-through are real.
If the break stalls, becomes lethargic, or immediately returns inside the level, mark as false-break risk.
Prefer retest/acceptance after break rather than chasing the break candle.

gates: downgrade breakout_score when follow-through is weak
block entries after immediate failed break

primary_sources.member: Order Blocks Explained Trade Like the Banks (No BS Guide).txt
How do ( FVG, OB, RB ) work.txt

strategies.market_fit: FX majors only after robust candle-structure implementation and replay validation.

exact_parameters.name: structure_timeframes_seen
exact_parameters.source_note: Order-block source includes these chart contexts.

exact_parameters.name: validity_requirements
exact_parameters.source_note: Sources explicitly discuss BOS, mitigated block invalidation, and liquidity/volume/inefficiency.

entry_logic: Find the order block around the move that caused structure to break.
Reject blocks already mitigated by price returning into them before the setup.
Wait for return into the block and lower-timeframe confirmation before entry.
exit_logic: Invalidate beyond the block boundary or structure point.
Target nearby liquidity or opposing structure, not arbitrary far targets.

bot_feature_map.implementation_note: Do not enable until candle-zone extraction is unit-tested and replayed.

primary_sources.member: Smart Money Concepts How I Combine Liquidity Sweeps, FVGs & Order Blocks (Full Strategy).txt
ICT 2024 Mentorship  How To Trade ICT FVGs Correctly  September 16, 2024.txt
How do ( FVG, OB, RB ) work.txt

strategies.market_fit: Potential OANDA FX edge only if sweep/FVG detection is deterministic and spread-safe.

exact_parameters.name: entry_price
exact_parameters.value: 50% / midpoint of the fair value gap
exact_parameters.source_note: SMC source gives midpoint/50% lower-timeframe FVG entry.

exact_parameters.name: confirmation_timeframes
exact_parameters.source_note: SMC source names these for structure shift/change of character confirmation.

exact_parameters.name: target_type
exact_parameters.source_note: Source targets higher-timeframe liquidity after entry.

entry_logic: Higher timeframe: identify liquidity sweep plus order block/liquidity target.
Lower timeframe: require market structure shift or change of character.
Place limit order at 50% of the qualifying FVG instead of chasing market.
exit_logic: Stop at structure-defined invalidation around sweep/FVG model.
Take profit at nearest credible higher-timeframe liquidity pool.

bot_feature_map.implementation_note: Limit-order workflow needed; current shell is score-based only.

primary_sources.member: My Simple 5 Minute Scalping Strategy (Rules Based).txt

strategies.market_fit: May inform an FX session scalp variant, but source is not OANDA-specific.

exact_parameters.name: active_work_time
exact_parameters.source_note: Source frames strategy as a short focused session.

exact_parameters.name: bias_candle
exact_parameters.source_note: Source uses the first 15m candle as directional context.

exact_parameters.name: minimum_r_multiple
exact_parameters.source_note: Source states each trade needs a 2R multiple.

entry_logic: Use first 15-minute candle direction as the initial session bias.
Trade retest with strong price action; stop beyond the candle/range that invalidates the retest.

bot_feature_map.implementation_note: Replay only inside known strong windows before enabling.

strategies.market_fit: Needs true orderflow/volume data; OANDA spot FX candle feed is not enough by itself.

exact_parameters.name: concepts
exact_parameters.source_note: Source explicitly covers these orderflow concepts.

entry_logic: Use only as a confirmation layer if reliable volume/orderflow proxy is available.
Do not infer centralized orderflow from normal OANDA candle OHLC alone.

bot_feature_map.implementation_note: Keep disabled unless a valid data source is attached.
